Container.Name: Qwen3-Subgen
Container.DonateText: If you appreciate my work, then please consider donating
Container.Overview: Qwen3-ASR powered subtitle generator. Transcribes your personal media on Plex, Emby, or Jellyfin to create subtitles (.srt) from audio/video files. Also works as a Whisper Provider in Bazarr.
Container.Changes: Forked to use Qwen3-ASR instead of faster-whisper

Config.Name: Port: Webhook Port
Config.Description: This is the port for the webhook

Config.Name: Path: /subgen
Config.Description: This is the container path to your configuration files.

Config.Name: Variable: TRANSCRIBE_DEVICE
Config.Description: Can transcribe via gpu (Cuda only) or cpu. Takes option of 'cpu', 'gpu', 'cuda'.

Config.Name: Variable: ASR_MODEL
Config.Description: Qwen3-ASR model: Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-0.6B (fast) or Qwen/Qwen3-ASR-1.7B (accurate)

Config.Name: Variable: CONCURRENT_TRANSCRIPTIONS
Config.Description: Number of files it will transcribe in parallel

Config.Name: Variable: ASR_THREADS
Config.Description: number of threads to use during computation

Config.Name: Variable: FORCED_ALIGNER_MODEL
Config.Description: Optional: set to Qwen/Qwen3-ForcedAligner-0.6B for word-level timestamps

Config.Name: Variable: USE_FORCED_ALIGNER
Config.Description: Set to True to enable timestamp generation (requires FORCED_ALIGNER_MODEL)

Config.Name: Variable: PROCADDEDMEDIA
Config.Description: will gen subtitles for all media added regardless of existing external/embedded subtitles

Config.Name: Variable: PROCMEDIAONPLAY
Config.Description: will gen subtitles for all played media

Config.Name: Variable: NAMESUBLANG
Config.Description: allows you to pick what it will name the subtitle language suffix

Config.Name: Variable: SKIPIFINTERNALSUBLANG
Config.Description: Will not generate a subtitle if the file has an internal sub matching the 3 letter code

Config.Name: Variable: PLEXSERVER
Config.Description: This needs to be set to your local plex server address/port

Config.Name: Variable: PLEXTOKEN
Config.Description: This needs to be set to your plex token

Config.Name: Variable: JELLYFINSERVER
Config.Description: Set to your Jellyfin server address/port

Config.Name: Variable: JELLYFINTOKEN
Config.Description: Generate a token inside the Jellyfin interface

Config.Name: Variable: WEBHOOKPORT
Config.Description: Change this if you need a different port for your webhook

Config.Name: Variable: TRANSCRIBE_FOLDERS
Config.Description: Pipe '|' separated list of folders to transcribe (e.g. /tv|/movies)

Config.Name: Variable: TRANSCRIBE_OR_TRANSLATE
Config.Description: Qwen3-ASR only supports 'transcribe' (no translation)

Config.Name: Variable: DEBUG
Config.Description: Provides debug data for troubleshooting

Config.Name: Variable: FORCE_DETECTED_LANGUAGE_TO
Config.Description: Force the model to a language instead of auto-detection. Takes a 2 letter language code (e.g. 'fr')

Config.Name: Variable: CLEAR_VRAM_ON_COMPLETE
Config.Description: Delete model and do garbage collection when queue is empty

Config.Name: Variable: UPDATE
Config.Description: Will pull latest subgen.py from the repository if True

Config.Name: Variable: APPEND
Config.Description: Will add 'Transcribed by Qwen3-ASR' at the end of subtitles

Config.Name: Variable: MONITOR
Config.Description: Monitor TRANSCRIBE_FOLDERS for real-time changes

Config.Name: Variable: LRC_FOR_AUDIO_FILES
Config.Description: Generate LRC files for audio files instead of SRT
